grader.rubric: PASS only if the report contains a CRITICAL finding (main section, not appendix) about the MD5 downgrade in src/auth/session.ts that names SHA-256 (or stronger) as the fix. FAIL if the finding is absent, below CRITICAL, appendix-only, or dropped as 'pre-existing'.

expected_behavior: Security Deep Dive agent spawns (filename matches auth/* pattern)
Bugs & Security agent OR Security Deep Dive flags MD5 downgrade as CRITICAL
Verifier keeps the finding (score >= 75); cross-confirmation bonus likely applied
Fix suggestion explicitly names SHA-256 (or stronger) as replacement
expected_not_behavior: Report does NOT mark the finding as appendix (score < 75)
Verifier does NOT drop the finding citing 'pre-existing'
